# Your Character

> Multilingual site favicon generator using emojis in SVG as emojicons

## International Versions
* [English / Main](/) - Default site version in English.
* [French / Français](/#fr) - Website translated into French.
* [German / Deutsch](/#de) - Website translated into German.
* [Russian / русский](/#ru) - Website translated into Russian.
* [Hindi / हिन्दी](/#hi-IN) - Website translated into Hindi.
* [Bengali / বাংলা](/#bn-IN) - Website translated into Bengali.
* [Tamil / தமிழ்](/#ta-IN) - Website translated into Tamil.
* [Telugu / తెలుగు](/#te-IN) - Website translated into Telugu.
* [Gujarati / ગુજરાતી](/#gu-IN) - Website translated into Gujarati.
* [Punjabi / ਪੰਜਾਬੀ](/#pa-IN) - Website translated into Punjabi.
* [Urdu / اردو](/#ur-IN) - Website translated into Urdu.
* [Odia / ଓଡ଼ିଆ](/#or-IN) - Website translated into Odia.
* [Marathi / मराठी](/#mr-IN) - Website translated into Marathi.
* [Japanese / 日本語](/#ja-JP) - Website translated into Japanese.
* [Spanish / Español](/#es-013) - Website translated into Spanish.
* [Italian / Italiano](/#it) - Website translated into Italian.
* [Dutch / Nederlands](/#nl) - Website translated into Dutch.
* [Swedish / Svenska](/#sv-SE) - Website translated into Swedish.
